And so we can envision Peter and John in the temple courts, amid the massive throngs of worshippers, submitting for the last time in this respect to the law of Moses, and there witnessing and participating in the ceremonial performances so familiar to them. We cannot leave this scene without singling out certain of the scriptural words chanted that day by the Levites. The language is recorded in…
